en_title: Assassin's Creed Co-Creator Re-Reveals 1666 Amsterdam, 30-Minute Demo Playable Now
cn_title: 《刺客信条》联合创始人重推《1666阿姆斯特丹》，试玩版现已上线
subtitle: 十五年后，重见天日
opus_summary: 《刺客信条》联合创始人Patrice Désilets在夏日游戏节上重新公布《1666阿姆斯特丹》，免费试玩序章已在Steam和Epic Games Store上线，正式版2026年PC抢先体验。

paragraphs.en: Once-abandoned historical action adventure 1666 Amsterdam has been reannounced at Summer Game Fest by Assassin's Creed co-creator Patrice Désilets.
paragraphs.cn: 曾被放弃的历史动作冒险游戏《1666阿姆斯特丹》在夏日游戏节上由《刺客信条》联合创始人Patrice Désilets重新公布。

paragraphs.en: Described as a dark third-person story-led action-adventure, 1666 Amsterdam has re-emerged 15 years after Désilets first began working on the concept back at the long-defunct THQ Montreal. That studio was then bought by Ubisoft, for whom Désilets worked for several years before his acrimonious departure.
paragraphs.cn: 《1666阿姆斯特丹》被描述为一款黑暗风格的第三人称剧情驱动动作冒险游戏，在Désilets最初于早已解散的THQ Montreal开始构思这一概念15年后，它重新浮出水面。该工作室随后被育碧收购，Désilets为育碧工作了数年，之后不欢而散。

paragraphs.en: Now at his own studio Panache Digital, which made ape survival game Ancestors: A Humankind Odyssey, Désilets won back the rights to 1666 Amsterdam — though opted to make Ancestors first.
paragraphs.cn: 如今，Désilets在他自己的工作室Panache Digital（曾制作猿类生存游戏《先祖：人类奥德赛》）赢回了《1666阿姆斯特丹》的版权——尽管他选择先制作了《先祖》。

paragraphs.en: Now, a free playable 30-minute prologue is available now on Steam and Epic Games Store, while the full game is set to launch in early Access on PC in 2026, with console versions coming later.
paragraphs.cn: 目前，一个时长30分钟的免费试玩序章已在Steam和Epic Games Store上线，而完整版游戏将于2026年在PC平台开启抢先体验，主机版稍后推出。

paragraphs.en: “It’s been a long time coming, and I couldn’t be prouder of our team of nearly 70 talented developers in Montreal," Désilets said. "For the past six years, we’ve focused on one thing above all else: the game itself. No fake footage, no vertical slices, just a playable experience evolving build after build, day after day.
paragraphs.cn: 「这一刻等了很久，我为我们在蒙特利尔近70名才华横溢的开发团队感到无比自豪，」Désilets说道，「过去六年里，我们专注于一件事：游戏本身。没有虚假镜头，没有垂直切片，只有一个可玩的体验，日复一日，一个版本接一个版本地进化。」

paragraphs.en: "Today, we’re finally ready to invite players into that process. The free prologue available now on Steam and Epic Games Store is only a small taste of what’s to come, an amuse-bouche before a nine-course dinner, an introduction to the world, its characters, and its different time periods. We hope players will enjoy discovering it as much as we’ve enjoyed creating it."
paragraphs.cn: 「今天，我们终于准备好邀请玩家加入这个过程。目前在Steam和Epic Games Store上提供的免费序章只是未来内容的一小口，是九道菜大餐前的开胃小点，是对这个世界、角色以及不同时代的介绍。我们希望玩家能像我们享受创作它一样，享受发现它的乐趣。」

paragraphs.en: Here's everything announced at Summer Game Fest 2026 if you need a catch up on what the video game industry has in store.
paragraphs.cn: 如果你想了解游戏行业的最新动态，这里是2026年夏日游戏节公布的所有内容。

paragraphs.en: Tom Phillips is IGN's News Editor. You can reach Tom at tom_phillips@ign.com or find him on Bluesky
paragraphs.cn: Tom Phillips是IGN的新闻编辑。你可以通过tom_phillips@ign.com联系他，或在Bluesky上找到他。
